arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) assigned to the IAM user.

id.description: The unique ID assigned to the IAM user.

path.description: The path to the IAM user in the AWS directory structure.

permissions_boundary.description: The ARN of the policy that is used to set the permissions boundary for the IAM user.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the IAM user.

user_id.description: The stable and unique string identifying the IAM user.
